---
title: "Citation"
---

## SimiC-Suite

Please cite the SimiC-Suite application note when using the combined software suite.

```bibtex
@article{simic_suite_placeholder,
  title   = {SimiC-Suite: A reproducible framework for phenotype-specific gene regulatory network analysis from single-cell RNA-seq data},
  author  = {Author names to be added},
  journal = {Journal to be added},
  year    = {Year to be added},
  doi     = {DOI to be added}
}
```

## Original SimiC Citation

Please also cite the original SimiC work when using SimiCPipeline where appropriate.

```bibtex
@article{simic_original_placeholder,
  title   = {Original SimiC citation title to be added},
  author  = {Author names to be added},
  journal = {Journal to be added},
  year    = {Year to be added},
  doi     = {DOI to be added}
}
```
